---
description: "Create or join an experiment branch. Experiments run on short-lived `exp/<slug>` branches in a dedicated worktree. They never merge to `main` and neve"
---

Follow the workflow defined in `.claude/commands/exp-start.md` in this
repository. Read that file and execute its steps exactly — it is the
canonical definition of the /exp-start command; this prompt is a thin adapter
so the command stays single-sourced. Treat any text after the prompt
invocation as the command's arguments ($ARGUMENTS).
